# Korax Systems

> Bespoke automation software and desktop tools for UK small businesses.

Korax Systems builds custom Windows and Mac desktop applications and workflow automation tools for small businesses. All software is fixed-price, owned outright by the client with no recurring licence fees, and built to be maintained and extended long-term.

## Services

- Desktop Automation Tools: Custom applications replacing manual, repetitive tasks. Offline-ready.
- Workflow & Task Automation: Connects existing systems, eliminates copy-paste work, automates scheduling, reporting, and notifications.
- Ongoing Support & Maintenance: Updates, bug fixes, and enhancements as the business evolves.

## Contact

- Email: enquires@koraxsystems.co.uk
- Website: https://koraxsystems.co.uk
- Coverage: United Kingdom
